title: Help & Support
subtitle: Simple guides to help you succeed with RetailMind AI
quickStartDesc: Get up and running in 5 minutes
faq1A: Simply add your first product with its price and stock. RetailMind AI will automatically start tracking competitor prices and generating recommendations.
faq2A: Our AI searches major e-commerce platforms like Amazon and Flipkart to find your products and track their prices in real-time.
faq3A: Based on market data, our AI suggests pricing changes, restocking alerts, and opportunities to increase revenue.
faq4A: Yes! All your data is encrypted and stored securely on AWS. We never share your information with third parties.
faq5Q: Can I track products from any platform?
faq5A: Currently we support Amazon, Flipkart, and other major Indian e-commerce platforms. More platforms coming soon!
faq6Q: How accurate are the price comparisons?
faq6A: We use advanced AI to match products with 95%+ accuracy. You can also provide direct product URLs for exact matching.
